# OpenCortex Memory

> MCP server for AI agent long-term memory with reinforcement learning, vector search, and multi-tenant isolation.

## Overview

OpenCortex Memory is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI agents persistent memory across sessions. It uses Qdrant vector search for semantic retrieval and reward-based feedback scoring to surface the most relevant memories over time.

Key capabilities:
- Store, search, and recall memories via MCP tools
- Reinforcement learning: reward/penalize memories to improve retrieval ranking
- Automatic semantic deduplication
- Multi-tenant project-based isolation
- Dual mode: local (self-hosted) or remote (JWT-authenticated)

## Install

Claude Code: `/plugin install` → select `opencortex-memory` → `npx opencortex-cli setup`
Codex CLI: `codex mcp add opencortex -- npx -y opencortex-memory && npx opencortex-cli setup`
Direct: `npx -y opencortex-memory`

## MCP Tools

- `recall`: Search long-term memory for relevant context (called before every response)
- `add_message`: Record a conversation turn for future learning (called after every response)
- `end`: End session and trigger knowledge extraction
- `store`: Persist explicit knowledge — preferences, facts, decisions, corrections
- `batch_store`: Bulk import multiple documents
- `search`: Search stored memories by natural language query
- `feedback`: Reinforce or penalize a memory via reward signal (adjusts future ranking)
- `forget`: Delete a memory permanently by URI or semantic query
- `decay`: Apply time-decay to all memories (maintenance)
- `system_status`: Health check and diagnostics

## Configuration

Config file: `~/.opencortex/mcp.json`
Environment overrides: `OPENCORTEX_MODE`, `OPENCORTEX_HTTP_URL`, `OPENCORTEX_TOKEN`, `OPENCORTEX_HTTP_PORT`

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/StardustVision/OpenCortex-Memory
- License: Apache-2.0
